evidence.excerpt: The Thousand Sails (Qianfan) constellation, also known as G60 Starlink or Spacesail, is China's primary commercial low-Earth orbit (LEO) satellite internet mega constellation project. It was created by Shanghai Spacecom Satellite Technology (SSST), a firm backed by the Shanghai Municipal People's Government and the Chinese Academy of Sciences.
